'''Grekk 9''' was a male [[Norak Tull]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]]. He was promoted to [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] just prior to the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], in which he commanded a task force.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
